headline: The Iran war will change global energy markets in these important ways, oil executives say
summary: Iran's blockade of the Strait of Hormuz has resulted in the loss of nearly a billion barrels of oil with the shortage growing worse every day.

headline: BofA Reiterates Buy on Baker Hughes (BKR) Following Higher EBITDA Forecasts
summary: With a YTD Return of 35.11% as of May 7, Baker Hughes Company (NASDAQ:BKR) is included among the 10 Best Stocks to Buy to Beat the S&P 500. On May 4, BofA raised its price recommendation on Baker Hughes Company (NASDAQ:BKR) to $80 from $69. It reiterated a Buy rating on the shares. The firm said Baker […]

headline: Basin rig count up one as prices fall
summary: The rig count in the Permian Basin was up one this week, the latest count Friday by Baker Hughes shows, with 242 rigs active in the region. A year ago, 285 rigs were active in the region. Nationally, the oil and gas rig count is up one from last week at 548 rigs. A year ago, 578 rigs were active. The count shows that 410 rigs sought oil, up two from the previous week, and 129 explored for ...
